label: Ritual stage action (stun pawns)
description: Stuns the pawns assigned to the specified roles for a given number of ticks.

roleIds.label: Role IDs
roleIds.description: IDs of roles whose assigned pawns will be stunned.

stunDurationTicks.label: Stun duration ticks
stunDurationTicks.description: Number of ticks for which the pawns will be stunned. Defaults to 10.
